Thank you for contributing to Mind! 🧠

## Pull Request Checklist

Please ensure your PR meets these requirements:

- [ ] Code builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No linting errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] All TypeScript types are correct
- [ ] Tested the changes locally
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Followed mental health content guidelines (if applicable)
- [ ] No API keys or secrets in code
- [ ] Reviewed security implications

## Description

Please describe your changes and their purpose.

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Testing

Describe how you tested your changes:

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots of UI changes here.

## Mental Health Considerations

If this PR affects mental health content or features:

- [ ] Consulted with mental health guidelines
- [ ] Maintains empathetic and supportive tone
- [ ] Preserves crisis intervention features
- [ ] Includes appropriate disclaimers

## Additional Notes

Any additional information that reviewers should know.
